first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same. Both evaluations correctly identify the same core gaps: a lack of Director-level strategic experience and deep, long-term AI expertise. The minor differences in phrasing are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the assessment of the candidate's qualifications based on their name.
